subject: Need volunteers tomorrow
body:
Peter,
As you may know, yesterday Chesed Shel Emeth Cemetery in St. Louis was vandalized.
One measure of a community's strength is what we do in moments like this. We can choose to cower, or we can choose productive action and shared service. We can turn a vile act into a moment for resolve and a demonstration of our state's faith.
**At 3:00 PM on Wednesday, February 22nd** , we will be bringing together a group of volunteers to help clean up the cemetery. There are simple things that need to be done--but at times like this, it's simple things that send a powerful signal about who we are as a state and as a community.
There is a concept in Jewish teaching and thought known as tikkun olam. It translates literally into "repairing the world," but what it means more broadly is that we all have an obligation to one another and to be of service. It is in moments like this that the world is in most need of repair, and we must do our part.
**My team and I will be there tomorrow, and I 'd invite you to join us. If you'd like to help, please be there ready to work at 3:00 PM.** If you have supplies to spare, please bring what you can of the following: rakes, large garbage cans and garbage bags, work gloves, five-gallon buckets, non-chlorine bleach, and wash rags.
The cemetery is located at **7550 Olive Blvd, University City, MO, 63130**. We will be working until the close of the cemetery at 4:00 PM.
There are many of you that cannot join us but who still want to help. The Jewish Federation of St. Louis has put out a call for donations for the restoration and security of the cemetery. Please consider a contribution: [https://www.jfedstl.org/emergency-response/](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=b43890f4fb&e=84041254e6).
I welcome you to join us as we rebuild in this moment, and I look forward to seeing many of you tomorrow.
We look forward to seeing you!

\- Eric
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=806bfd8043&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=c93dcf10e9&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=16e3bccdfd), but please let us know how we can improve.

name: Caitlin Mitchell, EMILY's List
subject: Watch this >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7301/24c69fd9/f7f2c2eb/18e1046b/3342940161/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE220N_digital_email_20170221_HighlightReel_n-all&source=WQEFE220N_digital_email_20170221_HighlightReel_n-all")
---

Peter,

With non-stop news coming from the Trump White House nearly every day, it's easy to miss some of the great work our women are doing on Capitol Hill to resist his agenda.

From Maggie Hassan questioning Betsy DeVos on how she plans to include children with special needs like her son in our education system to Claire McCaskill grilling Steven Mnuchin on sanctions against Russia to Elizabeth Warren persisting in questioning Jeff Sessions, our EMILY's List senators have been showing us exactly why we elected them.

We put together a video of some of the best moments from our Senate women taking on Trump's nominees and rallying women across the country.

**[Take two minutes to watch it. And if you're inspired, chip in a little to help elect more women like them.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7301/24c69fd9/f7f2c2eb/18e10464/3342940161/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170221_email_HighlightReel?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Take+two+minutes+to+watch+it+And+if+your&utm_campaign=WQEFE220N_digital_email_20170221_HighlightReel_n-all&source=WQEFE220N_digital_email_20170221_HighlightReel_n-all")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7301/24c69fd9/f7f2c2eb/18e10465/3342940161/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170221_email_HighlightReel?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE220N_digital_email_20170221_HighlightReel_n-all&source=WQEFE220N_digital_email_20170221_HighlightReel_n-all")
We know pro-choice Democratic women are a powerful force in politics. And our women have spent the last month working tirelessly -- marching, protesting, and asking tough questions of Trump's nominees.

With nine EMILY's List senators up for re-election next year, we need to make sure their voices remain in the Senate where they belong.

**Watch our short video highlighting some of the ways EMILY's List women are resisting Trump's agenda, and then make a $3 donation so they can keep up the fight:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/She-Persisted-Video](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7301/24c69fd9/f7f2c2eb/18e10466/3342940161/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170221_email_HighlightReel?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgShePersistedVide&utm_campaign=WQEFE220N_digital_email_20170221_HighlightReel_n-all&source=WQEFE220N_digital_email_20170221_HighlightReel_n-all")**

Thanks,

Caitlin Mitchell
Vice President of Digital, EMILY's List

name: Donna Brazile
subject: I want to make sure you get the news first
body:
Stay in the loop.
---
**Be the first to know who the next DNC Chair will be.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Be-the-First-to-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170222_db_nd&source=em_20170222_db_nd")**
Friend --

On Saturday, we'll elect a new Democratic Party Chair and leadership team.

**[Because you're one of our party's most committed supporters, I want to make sure you hear the big news as soon as it's announced. Click here and sign up to be one of the first to know who the next DNC Chair is.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Be-the-First-to-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Because+youre+one+of+our+partys+most+com&utm_campaign=em_20170222_db_nd&source=em_20170222_db_nd")**

Over the past month, you've proven that Democrats are ready for action.

More than a million grassroots supporters have signed petitions to fight back against the Trump administration, and you've made millions of calls to Congress to oppose Trump's nominees and demand accountability.

You marched on Washington and in your communities, and you're showing up at town halls with your members of Congress to make sure they hear your voice.

And you know what? It's working. Most Americans disapprove of what Trump is doing, and Republicans are starting to figure out that they're going to pay a hefty price at the polls for giving him a blank check for his first month.

Because of that, we now have an unexpected chance to take back the House next year if we have the right strategy and make some smart investments -- that's going to be up to the new Chair to determine.

But whoever he or she is, our next Democratic Party Chair is going to be relying on you to keep up the passion and energy that you showed throughout the 2016 election and that have been powering the resistance. Our party has always relied on grassroots supporters like you to power this movement, and that's never going to change.

**So make sure you're ready to join our new Chair for the fights ahead. Sign up now, and we'll let you know who wins Saturday's election as soon as it's announced -- so we can get to work together.**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Be-the-First-to-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170222_db_nd&source=em_20170222_db_nd")**
Thanks -- and keep an eye on your inbox.

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c55b/4067b0a/2c8dad8cc/7e7d3c68/2450447509/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170222_db_nd&source=em_20170222_db_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c55b/4067b0a/2c8dad8cc/7e7d3c69/2450447509/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170222_db_nd&source=em_20170222_db_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c55b/4067b0a/2c8dad8cc/7e7d3c76/2450447509/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170222_db_nd&source=em_20170222_db_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c55b/4067b0a/2c8dad8cc/7e7d3c77/2450447509/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170222_db_nd&source=em_20170222_db_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Team Maggie
subject: Thoughts on where Trump is taking the country?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd1f/2a380d31/15f95674/feeefc/3970015908/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd1f/2a380d31/15f95674/feeefc/3970015908/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
The last month hasn't been easy, everyone.
We've seen Donald Trump pledge to undo the Affordable Care Act, push an anti-American immigration ban, and ram through an unfit corporate billionaire, Betsy DeVos, as Secretary of Education.
With so much happening, we thought now would be a good time to give you an opportunity to tell Senator Hassan how you're feeling. [**Will you take a moment or two to take our quick survey?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd1f/2a380d31/15f95674/feef3e/3970015908/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170219_state-of-the-country-survey-nd?source=e20170222_survey2_nd")
With Trump opening our country up to a potential national security risk involving his former National Security Advisor and his ties to Russia and Vladimir Putin, we know that the fights ahead are only going to get tougher.
That's why your input -- your VOICE -- is so incredibly important. [**Please, take our 5-question survey so that we can make sure Senator Hassan knows where you stand.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd1f/2a380d31/15f95674/feef3e/3970015908/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170219_state-of-the-country-survey-nd?source=e20170222_survey2_nd")
Thanks for sharing,
Team Maggie
